findings.title: Twilio signature check bypassable via Host header
findings.summary: host.includes('localhost') skips HMAC validation. Attacker-controlled Host header on Cloud Run lets a forged request reach /api/attendance/twiml and /api/attendance/twiml-status.
findings.impact: Forge TwiML traffic; advance victim outreach transcripts; burn LLM cost via generateAgentReply/generateCallSummary.
findings.fix: Gate on NODE_ENV !== 'production' AND exact host match.

findings.title: Odia parent-call always runs in English
findings.summary: TWILIO_LANGUAGE_MAP.Odia=null + nullish-coalesce to 'en-IN' makes every Odia outreach call the parent in English, with Odia text rendered by en-IN-Neural2-A.
findings.impact: Voice never works for Odia language — parent-call feature non-functional for the entire language.
findings.fix: Either route Odia outreach through Sarvam streaming, or skip the call with a notice — never silently coerce to English.

findings.title: Call-summary regenerated on every Twilio status retry
findings.summary: generateAndSaveSummary fires whenever callStatus==='completed' && transcript.length > 1, with no read of existing.callSummary. Twilio retries status callbacks. transcript-sync/route.ts:87 has the correct guard — twiml-status does not.
findings.impact: LLM cost amplification per retry; callSummary fields flip between successive runs.
findings.fix: Mirror transcript-sync guard or use a Firestore transaction with a generatedAt sentinel.

findings.title: Gather POST has no (CallSid, turnNumber) dedup
findings.summary: Each POST unconditionally appends parent+agent turns to transcript and increments turnCount. Twilio retries on 5xx/timeout — retried Gather double-writes the transcript, fires a second LLM call, and accelerates MAX_TURNS cutoff.
findings.impact: Duplicate transcript entries; second LLM cost per retry; possible premature hangup.
findings.fix: Dedup on last-seen (CallSid, SpeechResult) within N seconds or use Twilio's RetryCount as an idempotency key.

findings.title: Twilio Punjabi speech tag pa-Guru-IN is non-standard
findings.summary: Twilio's documented Gather language code for Punjabi is pa-IN. pa-Guru-IN is BCP-47-legal but not in Twilio's published Gather catalog — Gather silently falls back to en-US on unrecognised tags.
findings.impact: Punjabi parent speech may be run through an English recognizer.
findings.fix: Verify against Twilio's Gather Languages docs and switch to pa-IN if not listed.

verifiedSafe.title: Soft-empty STT returns 200 with empty text
ISO normalisation (od→or, pun→pa, mar→mr) at output boundary
Script-mismatch retry path catches Sarvam pa→hi Devanagari mis-tag
Odia TTS fallback or-IN → hi-IN-Standard-A documented and applied pre-call
Intent cache tool-trigger exclusion gated by vidyaIntentCacheGate

scopeNotes: Live HTTP repros not executed in this forensic env (no gcloud impersonation credentials wired). All findings are static-trace + cross-reference grounded.
Sidecar canary-overshoot logic owned by Q4C lane (commit 9c8483b9c) — not re-audited here.
Pipecat streaming TwiML path treated as alpha (orchestrator URL absent).
